name: Thamarah Al-Jill Co LLC
description: Developer of an online shopping platform intended to connect buyers and sellers looking for authenticated preowned luxury fashion. The company's platform is for preloved luxury fashion with a conscience where they provide an inventory of unique pieces; including handbags, shoes, accessories, and jewelry, with rare, discontinued, or limited edition pieces, enabling shoppers to access limited exclusive luxury items at a competitive cost.

name: ElMetr
description: Operator of an online legal platform designed to find a suitable lawyer to handle legal tasks. The company's platform allows users to search for lawyers in the streams of family law, commercial law, criminal law, civil law, military courts, workers' law, administrative judiciary, and state councils and simplifies legal practice by offering a cloud-based SaaS solution designed for lawyers, which manages cases, billing, and client interaction, enabling users to connect to qualified lawyers.

name: Firnas Aero
description: Provider of a Drones-as-a-Service platform intended to offer inspection services using our unmanned aerial systems. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence and utilizes aviation technology in the form of unmanned aviation vehicles for providing inspection services using their own proprietary aerial systems to overcome the risks and challenges of traditional inspection processes, enabling businesses and governments to get more accurate results and eliminate the risks associated with dangerous inspections.

name: Glance care
description: Developer of a crowdsourced software testing platform designed to provide access to testers and devices. The company's platform connects software testers with businesses to provide development of mobile apps, games, and websites for bugs, security, and UX/UI issues, enabling software companies to outsource testing and launch better apps with fewer bugs at an affordable price.

name: Glance Care
description: Developer of digital health consultation platform designed to assist medical professionals in delivering high-quality clinical recommendations. The company's platform offers clinical decision support systems to secure better patient outcomes by providing more accurate diagnoses, saving diagnosis time resulting in enhanced decision making for medical professionals, thereby enabling healthcare professionals to potentially deliver better outcomes in clinical accuracy and productivity.

name: Labayh
description: Operator of a psychological care platform that provides well-being and mental health services. The company's platform connects users with licensed psychologists and psychiatrists through its mobile application, to offer consultations related to different problems that affect their mental health, enabling users to connect with doctors and receive advice for their health issues.

name: Lucidya
description: Developer of a customer experience management platform designed to help organizations make improved strategic decisions. The company's platform uses a spatial data search engine to analyze both current and historical social media content in real-time using the contents published on different channels, enabling businesses to leverage consumers' feedback and expand their reach to target customers.

name: FilSekka
description: Developer of a mobile application for new mothers designed for educating them about their pregnancy and motherhood journeys. The company offers all medical and non-medical services and products that they would need to look after themselves as well as their babies, enabling mothers to provide them with everything she needs during this period and to be the best partner in this arduous journey.

name: Monkibox
description: Provider of learning subscription services intended to support baby's cognitive and motor development with toys. The company provides educational toys every two months that contain unique and specifically tailored toys for a specified age group of babies, helping parents turn playtime into a learning experience for their children.

name: Rabbit Mobility
description: Developer of an application designed to create a proper urban living for Egyptians by providing eco-friendly alternatives for short-distance transportation. The company's application offers e-scooter, standard bicycles, a day-rental option and flexible leasing timelines, enabling users to rent scooters by the minute and to commute from one place to another.

name: Sanad Cash
description: Developer of an all-in-one spending management platform intended to track all spending from one single dashboard. The company's platform tracks all business transactions with instant corporate card issuing to control spending and instantly issue multi-currencies corporate cards for employees, enabling startups, small and medium enterprises and corporates to reduce fraud and save time collecting expense receipts.

name: ShipCash
description: Developer of a digital platform designed to help e-commerce sellers receive payments instantly for cash on delivery orders. The company's platform specializes in integrating directly with shipping companies' systems to provide seamless, efficient and cost-effective cash payment and collection options for small and medium vendors shipping across the region, enabling clients with the simplified, easy and quick process to receive payments.

name: El-Dokan
description: Operator of an information technology consulting company intended to develop enterprise e-commerce software designed for large and growing retail stores. The company's expertise involves end-to-end software development and web application development for e-commerce businesses, enabling clients to focus more on their core businesses.

name: Tenex
description: Developer of a tenant engagement platform designed to optimize the commercial real estate experience for tenants. The company's platform specializes in providing tech-enabled services to handle and manage properties, enabling property managers and landlords to offer quality services to their clients.

name: Zeew
description: Developer of an online business development software designed to help businesses launch their digital platform immediately. The company's software has a variety of features that include category management, customer management, payment integration, instant order notification, and restaurant owner settings, enabling restaurants, pharmaceuticals, and other businesses to get a seamless online ordering and delivery experience.
